name: The Emberwood
description: High fantasy. A forest where a fallen star still burns underground — the apprentice Aldric follows its light to the ruined shrine, where the hex-witch Morvath is waiting. Original content.
author: Genesis Infinity

effects.name: Scorched
effects.description: Seared by a gout of conjured flame.

effects.name: Hexed
effects.description: A witch's curse clings and drags at every motion.

effects.name: Emberfall Burn
effects.description: Falling cinders from the burning canopy scald exposed skin.

items.name: Mana Draught
items.description: A cordial of steeped starflower that eases wounds and steadies the casting hand.

items.name: Warded Cloak
items.description: A traveling cloak stitched with protective sigils that turn aside stray magic.
